message:
feat(beads): Add comprehensive testing requirements and optimize structure

Changes:
- Lower epic priorities to P4 (containers, not actionable)
- Add 2 new test infrastructure beads:
  - bd-ryot: TUI unit test infrastructure (test harness, mock data)
  - bd-2u2g: E2E test framework (logging, assertions, runner)
- Add testing requirements to all task beads:
  - Unit tests with specific test function names
  - Integration tests
  - E2E test scripts with detailed logging
  - Logging requirements per feature
- Update dependency structure:
  - TUI tasks depend on TUI test infrastructure
  - CLI tasks depend on E2E test framework
  - Error handling depends on error schema

Final structure:
- P1: 7 items (test infra + critical fixes)
- P2: 11 items (important enhancements)
- P3: 7 items (polish)
- P4: 6 items (epics)

No cycles detected. Graph healthy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
